assignment_procedure: Synthetic students are assigned in equal numbers by a declared computer-generated blocked procedure.
causal_scope: Causal interpretation is limited to the declared assignment, implementation, and synthetic pilot conditions.
design: Two-group pilot with declared stratified random assignment.
missingness_rule: No missing outcomes in the registered synthetic dataset.
research_question: Do students assigned to a structured study routine differ in post-session performance from students using a standard routine?
